title: Girls Happy Birthday Balloon Banner Pink Purple – 16 Inch Self Inflating Happy Birthday Banners Balloons with 2 Pack 18in Stars, 2 straws & 1 Roll Ribbon
features: Pink Purple Happy Birthday Balloon Banner: Your birthday party will be much more decent and vivid by hanging these pink birthday banner balloons decorations.

PREMINUM QUALITY: the high quality self-inflating HAPPY BIRTHDAY decorations balloons will Hardly leaking and long last for the whole birthday party EVEN several weeks, these happy birthday banner balloons are Not easy to break or explode. You could feel the smoothing great quality when you touch it.

Size: Each Alphbet is about 40cm long and each star is 18 inch. Material: Aluminum Foil balloons. Can be hung on the wall in bunting style or taped to create straight lines. Suitable for filling with air only for use at any girls birthday party.

Package Includes: 1 set 16” Pink Foil Happy Birthday Balloon Banner(including 13 pcs 16 inch alphabets), 1pc 18” big pink star balloon, 1pc 18” purple star balloon, 1 Roll of Ribbon and 2pcs Straw (ships uninflated)
Wonderful Customer Service: If there're any problems of our product, please feel free to contact us, replacement or refund will be offered in 24 hours.
